ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND($Setup.Disable_Metadata_Settings__c.Disable_Product_Validation_WF__c == false, $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', OR(ISNEW(), ISCHANGED( Customer__c)), OR( AND($Profile.Name <> 'Goeasy Community User', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'GoEasy_CCS_Account', Customer__r.RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'CCS_Accounts'),
AND($Profile.Name <> 'Flexiti Community User', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Flexiti_CCS_Account', Customer__r.RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'Flexiti_CCS_Customer'),
AND(OR(RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Credit_Card_Account',RecordType.DeveloperName ='Loan_Account'), Customer__r.RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'Fidem_Customer'),
AND(OR(RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Distressed_Account',RecordType.DeveloperName = 'CCS_Account'), Customer__r.RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'Canaccede_Customer') ) )
